resources.string:
XP SafeConnect Monitoring Service

This accessibility service enables comprehensive device monitoring including:
• App usage tracking
• Messaging activity detection
• User interaction monitoring

This service is required for proper monitoring functionality and will only collect data as authorized by the device owner.

XP SafeConnect Device Administrator

Enables enhanced security features including:
• Remote device locking/unlocking
• Anti-tamper protection
• Prevent unauthorized uninstallation

These features help ensure continuous monitoring and device security.
